sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts

values.CommandLine: C:\Windows\system32\net1 stop NetBackup BMR MTFTP Service /y

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Adversaries may stop services or processes in order to conduct Data Destruction or Data Encrypted for Impact on the data stores of services like Exchange and SQL Server.
